A.text: along the outer surface of each backbone

B.text: only at the start and end of each backbone

D.text: on one side of a backbone, without connecting to the opposite backbone

parsed.rationale: The image clearly shows the nitrogen bases (colored blocks) positioned in the center, connecting the two sugar-phosphate backbones. This arrangement places them between the backbones rather than on the outside or at the ends. The visual representation confirms that the bases form rungs between the two strands.
